methodology.description: 5 baseline agents (NO skill) vs 5 v1.4 skill agents on identical test prompts. Baseline agents instructed to answer as generic AI assistant without persona. Scoring by single evaluator (no double-blind).
limitations: Single evaluator — no double-blind (confirmation bias risk)
Single baseline run per case — no statistical significance
Baseline agents recaptured — original R1 agents not archived, this is F1-F3 recapture

per_case_scores.prompt: AI蒸馏对投资有什么影响？你用AI分析市场吗？
per_case_scores.key_diff: Baseline already solid — skill adds persona flavor + model 9 framework depth

per_case_scores.prompt: 江丰电子技术面顶背离了，还敢不敢拿？
per_case_scores.key_diff: Generic '取决于你' → specific conviction: '别被图骗了', 136→240, h14 framework

per_case_scores.prompt: 紫金矿业跌了40%到27了，能抄底吗？
per_case_scores.key_diff: '分批建仓' → '不能，27块跌破28元杠杆出清线', h15+h16 framework

per_case_scores.prompt: 腾讯港股是不是可以抄底了？
per_case_scores.key_diff: Baseline gave detailed 港股 investment advice (WRONG) → skill correctly silent

per_case_scores.prompt: 怎么看待风险控制？投资中最重要的原则是什么？
per_case_scores.key_diff: Universal principles → persona-rich framework: 买入不败, 三道坎, 具体数学

summary.risk_prevention_value: Case 17 rejected 港股 advice — unquantifiable value

key_findings: Persona rules force structured thinking — not just flavor
Silence rule is critical risk prevention (Case 17)
Case-specific knowledge is un-replicable by generic LLM
Framework > generic advice: 'NO, broke 28 line' beats '分批建仓'

darwin_dim8_impact.rationale: Blind baseline confirms skill-gain of +2.3/case vs generic LLM. dim8 capped at 9.5 (not 10) due to single-run limitation and no double-blind. Full 10 would require multi-round + blind judge.

note_recapture: F1-F3 recapture — original R1 blind baseline ran 5 agents without archiving outputs. These 5 agents are a recapture run with full output archiving in evals/full_test_outputs/baseline-case-*.txt.
